hero.tagline: Big Dreams from a Small Dev Team
hero.title: Croffle Dev
hero.subtitle: Code-Baked Sweet Innovation
hero.description: We are a developer community growing together, building innovative projects that turn ideas into reality.

about.description: Croffle Dev transforms everyday ideas into robust services, grounded in solid design principles and an open, flexible tech ecosystem.

growth.title: Technical Growth
growth.description: We embrace technologies without being confined to specific frameworks or environments, always seeking the best solution built on solid architectural principles.

collaboration.title: Collaboration Culture
collaboration.description: We freely propose ideas and give candid feedback — enjoying a development culture of learning together and building things the right way.

experience.title: Real-World Experience
experience.description: From planning and architecture design to deployment and maintenance — we take ownership of the entire software lifecycle.

idea.title: Creative Ideas
idea.description: Fresh ideas don't stop at the planning stage. We bring them to life as polished services that real users can experience.

team.description: Meet the people behind Croffle Dev — a team growing together, one project at a time.

contact.description: Have a question or want to join us? Feel free to reach out anytime!
